emails.subject: Re: Accounting for plane usage in year 2001
emails.subject_base: Accounting for plane usage in year 2001
emails.body: Re: Accounting for plane usage in year 2001 John thanks for the news release it looks like a good decision; particularly the discontinuance of goddwill amortization. Rod this sync's up w what Mr. McGowan had read in the World Herald.
